case_title: APOYO FINANCIERO INC. VS. MELVIN ONELIO DIAZ RODAS

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$50.00) SERVED FEB-13-2024, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT DIAZ RODAS, MELVIN ONELIO
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY APOYO FINANCIERO INC. AS TO DEFENDANT DIAZ RODAS, MELVIN ONELIO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-12-2024 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SC-109 AUTHORIZATION TO APPEAR [VERONICA ROSALES APPEARING ON BEHALF OF PLAINTIFF] FILED BY PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO INC.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-12-2024 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO MAY-17-2024 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF APOYO FIANCIERO INC. IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY VERONICA ROSALES. DEFENDANT MELVIN ONELIO DIAZ RODAS IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: CARA SANDBERG; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO INC. IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY VERONICA ROSALES. DEFENDANT MELVIN ONELIO DIAZ RODAS IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF IS ASSISTED BY SPANISH INTERPRETER SHANNON RAINTREE. PLAINTIFF STATED THIS MATTER HAS SETTLED AND THEY ARE REQUESTING A DISMISSAL. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: SYLVIA HUSING; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
